Kabrios Trust Center — why customers should trust Kabrios.

## Team background
- 25+ years of hands-on mission-critical cybersecurity
- Multinational banking (complex regulatory, real-time transaction systems)
- Global pharmaceutical (HIPAA, GxP, FDA)
- US federal agencies: IRS, FBI, Department of Energy, Health and Human Services

## Compliance posture (aligned & pursuing certification)
- SOC 2 Type II — certification process started
- ISO 27001 — certification process started
- NIST 800-53 (full catalog) — aligned, foundation for FedRAMP
- HIPAA — aligned, BAA formalization in progress
- FedRAMP — architecturally designed from ground up

## Infrastructure
- Hosted entirely on AWS
- AES-256 encryption at rest (KMS-managed)
- TLS 1.2+ encryption in transit
- Tenant isolation at every layer
- RBAC with least privilege, MFA, no shared credentials
- CloudTrail, GuardDuty, Security Hub, Config monitoring
- Automated daily backups, disaster recovery tested

## Security practices
- Secure development lifecycle (threat modeling, SAST, dependency scanning)
- Continuous vulnerability management with SLA-based remediation
- Third-party penetration testing
- Documented incident response procedures
- Controlled change management (peer review, staging, rollback)
- Employee background checks, security training, endpoint protection

## Data handling
- US-based AWS regions by default
- Defined retention and deletion policies
- Immutable audit logging
- No standing access to customer data
- Third-party/subprocessor risk assessment
- No sale of customer data

Contact: security@kabrios.com / contact@kabrios.com
